title: Almighty God, Your Word Is Cast

verses.text: Almighty God, your word is cast like seed into the ground; now let the dew of heav'n descend, and righteous fruits abound.
Let not the foe of Christ and man this holy seed remove, but give it root in ev'ry heart to bring forth fruits of love.
Let not the world's deceitful cares the rising plant destroy, but let it yield a hundredfold the fruits of peace and joy.
Oft as the precious seed is sown, your quick'ning grace bestow, that all whose souls the truth receive, its saving pow'r may know.
